description: next/ v4 — REAL ERP (erpdb.llm_test_v3.machineid_nodeid) projected onto the Level-3 MOM OperationsRequest = PLAN/SOLL (SMProfile-ProductionOrder). Replaces the sim-v5-erp-production-orders REST projection in the live cutover. order_status is a coded integer (1=angelegt/offen, 2=freigegeben, 3=in_arbeit, 4=rückgemeldet, 5=abgeschlossen — inferred from the produced-vs-planned correlation); the valueMap normalises it onto readable canonical tokens. NO filter (full real backlog per the cutover decision) — all lifecycle states ingested incl. the not-yet-released backlog (status 1) and the closed archive (status 5); the qty_shortfall cross-rule only joins the rows that have an OperationsResponse (confirmations exist for status 4+5). Maps ONLY the PLAN fields + join key — the IST (produzierte_stueckzahl) is the dedicated OperationsResponse entity (erp-operations-response, order_confirmations). cycle_time_planned_sec + sales_order_ref + priority have no column in machineid_nodeid → unmapped (optional attrs). Plan-vs-Ist (qty_shortfall) is the it-evaluator cross-source reconcile against OperationsResponse on production_order_no, NOT a single-entity constraint — this profile carries no constraints block.
